Petition For Order To (1) Deposit Funds Into Account Of Petitioner, Or In The Alternative, (2) Directing Appointment Of Successor Custodian
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that the petition for order to deposit funds into an account of petitioner, or in the alternative directing appointment of successor custodian is off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Property
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Property
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne T. Wong, Petitioner In Prp Per
The Court inquired whether bank accounts not listed in Exhibit A to the Trust Agreement were part of the General Assignment. He said the Court was not given information as to when those accounts were created, and that there can be no determination of whether or not the safe deposit box at Chase Bank is a trust asset without knowing its contents. He asked Mr. Wong if he was the executor of the estate named in the will. Mr. Wong replied in the affirmative. He said that he knew the safe deposit box was provided to his mother when she opened her Chase Bank accounts and believes it is empty, but he did not yet know when the accounts were set up. He said that the bank has not been cooperative in providing him information or access. The Court stated that he could not grant the petition based on what was before him. He suggested that Mr. Wong obtain counsel to assist him. He asked Mr. Wong if he wanted the hearing on the petition to be taken off calendar or continued. Mr. Wong requested that the matter be continued. The hearing on the Petition for Instructions re Trust Property was continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Property
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Continued To Aug-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
